overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a snowy tribal settlement called Song's Edge. The character traverses the village, ascends a snowy cliff path to overlook a vast mountainous valley, and returns to explore the settlement with its colorful tents and tribal NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy tribal village center with decorated totem tree

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy village passing tribal NPCs and colorful tents while heading toward a large decorated tree structure

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing near a tent entrance
group of villagers walking together through the settlement

entered.detail: large wooden structure with colorful banners and glowing blue ornaments at the top
canvas tents with wooden frames and colorful blue and green patterns
primitive wooden poles and structures supporting tribal decorations

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a snowy tribal village with the protagonist walking through the settlement. Several NPC villagers are scattered around, some walking and some standing near tents. A large decorated totem tree with colorful banners dominates the center of the village ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail ascending to cliff overlook

events.description: leaves the village area behind and begins ascending the snowy mountain path toward the cliff

agents.ego_description: climbing the snowy slope away from the village toward the cliff edge with no other characters in sight

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky terrain forming the path to the cliff edge
tall snow-capped mountain visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the village and begins ascending a snowy mountain trail. The path becomes rockier and steeper as it approaches the cliff edge. A prominent snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff overlook with panoramic view of snowy valley and distant mountains

events.description: location text 'SONG'S EDGE' appears on screen identifying the area
camera pans to reveal a distant mountain structure with glowing orange fire and smoke

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge looking out over the snowy valley and panning to view distant mountains

entered.detail: dense forest of snow-covered pine trees filling the valley below the cliff
large mountain structure with glowing orange fire and black smoke rising from the top

segments.scene_description: Standing at the cliff edge, the character overlooks a vast snowy valley filled with dense pine forests. The camera pans to reveal a dramatic distant mountain with fire and smoke. The location is identified as 'Song's Edge' through on-screen text.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy tribal village with multiple tents and wooden structures

events.description: turns away from the cliff vista and walks back into the tribal village area

agents.ego_description: returning to the village and walking through the settlement passing tribal tents and NPCs

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing near a decorated tent entrance
group of villagers gathered near tents in the settlement

entered.detail: decorated wooden poles with tribal markings and hanging ornaments

segments.scene_description: The character returns from the cliff overlook and re-enters the tribal village, walking through a different section with more tents and wooden totem poles. Several NPC villagers are visible walking and standing among the snow-covered tents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the heart of a snowy tribal settlement up to a dramatic mountain overlook and back again. It begins within the village, moving past scattered NPCs and colorful banners draped over a central totem tree. As the character leaves the settlement, the terrain shifts into a steep, rocky mountain trail that ascends toward a distant snow-capped peak. The scene then opens at a cliff edge to reveal a vast valley of dense pine forests and a far-off mountain engulfed in fire and smoke, marked by the text Song's Edge. Finally, the camera retreats from the overlook and descends back into the village, weaving through a different section of snow-covered tents and wooden totem poles.
